Intraday post (07/July)

Monthly and weekly post is out with some contemplation over momentum… New educational post about my personal trading principles. To be continued…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The market draws a clear short fly pattern, betting on lower vol and stabilization. The speed profile is net positive, meaning upside longer gamma, and downside shorter gamma. The centroid I code at 6225.71; this is the lvl where upside or downside gammas can take effect.Shorter downside gamma accelerate the price downward until 6183 that I code as min. Upside pivot (slowing move, not really tradeable with direction) would be at 6273; and if move can hold above 6251 until 1.35pm, this upside pivot becomes magnetic. into the close (into powerhour, we have a strong support at 6282.4The upside pivot is the upside long gamma. It can be broken only, if the traders start to bid vol up, and I estimate that it is possible during the first half of the trading day. If the upside pivot is broken, 6280 is local pivot, especially strong after 2.30pm (6285 is pin from there, price should decide); but i code the max at 6300 with a sharp, tradeable rejection back to 6280/75. This gamma squeezes move is basically the net bet of the market for today!

Today to be below the centroid is only possible, if the market opens below that. It’d create an oscillation below itself the the downward min, likely pin toward 6215 in the last 1.5 hours. The passage of time is supportive today.

(Description is here)
